description: Style noteA belt can say a lot about your dressing sense. We recommend this peter england belt to polish a formal office look or class up an off-duty ensemble. The brand perfects this traditional accessory's foray into  modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Multiple uses for a single belt - what's not to love?Product DetailsBrown textured belt with a tang clasp iFixed loop and holes to customise the FitBranding embossed at the end of the beltMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary
